name: Verkada
description: Monitor Verkada cloud-managed physical security platform for camera device inventory, firmware compliance, and alert configuration

config.setupInstructions:
1. Sign in to Verkada Command at https://command.verkada.com
2. Go to Organization Settings > API Keys (Organization Admin required)
3. Click '+ New API Key' and name it (e.g. 'CompAI Integration')
4. Select Read-Only permissions for Camera, Access Control, and Sensors
5. Set an expiration date and click 'Generate Key'
6. Copy the API Key immediately - it is only shown once
7. Enter the API Key and your region's API Base URL below

Region URLs:
- US (default): https://api.verkada.com
- Europe: https://api.eu.verkada.com
- Australia: https://api.au.verkada.com
- GovCloud: https://api.verkadagov.com

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Verkada Command > Organization Settings > API Keys. Requires Organization Admin permissions.

credentialFields.label: API Base URL
credentialFields.helpText: US: https://api.verkada.com | EU: https://api.eu.verkada.com | AU: https://api.au.verkada.com | GovCloud: https://api.verkadagov.com

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Lists all cameras and devices in the Verkada organization and verifies they are online

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Checks that all Verkada camera firmware is up to date

checks.name: Monitoring and Alerting
checks.description: Verifies that Verkada camera alerts and notifications are being generated, indicating active monitoring
